text:
The actor who won an Academy Award for his performance in the classic film **The African Queen** was **Humphrey Bogart**.

Bogart received the Academy Award for Best Actor for his portrayal of Charlie Allnut. This award was presented at the 25th Academy Awards ceremony, held on March 19, 1953, honoring films released in 1952.

While Katharine Hepburn was also nominated for Best Actress for her role as Rose Sayer in the same film, she did not win that year.

FINAL ANSWER: Humphrey Bogart
